creator: redrat@mail.ru
text:
Hello!

There is some changes in the new version of ipmitool, which leads to
this kind of error. Look at similar bugreport here:

https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=877219

I turned on force-authentication and force-encryption on my BMC and
added "-C 3" to command line, and now I can connect by SOL again.

-- 
WBR, Alexey Markov.
